actors.title: Actors
actors.subtitle: Browse by actor. Tags here are actor-only user tags, not movie tags.
actors.ariaClearTagFilter: Clear actor tag filter and show all actors

toasts.manualLibraryScanFailed: Library scan ended without full success — {message}

shell.searchLibraryPlaceholder: Search by code, title, actor, or tag
shell.searchCuratedPlaceholder: Search curated frames: title, code, actor, tags…

history.title: Watch history
history.subtitle: Grouped by watch time; with the API enabled, progress is stored in the server SQLite database, otherwise in the browser.
history.empty: No entries yet. Watch for a moment in the player and they will appear here.

curated.title: Curated Frame
curated.subtitle: In the player, click Curated or press {key} to capture the current frame; sorted by capture time. Use the top search (this library only). Delete from the card or detail.
curated.empty: No curated frames yet. Capture some from the player.
curated.tagMaxRunes: Each tag may have at most {n} characters
curated.deleteConfirm: Delete "{label}"? This permanently removes the frame and its tags (server DB in API mode, otherwise local IndexedDB).
curated.saveFailedIdb: Could not save to local curated library (IndexedDB).
curated.saveFailedApi: Could not save to server curated library. Ensure javd is running.
curated.captureNotReady: Video not ready or zero size
curated.detailDialogDesc: Frame details and tags; closing saves tags. Tags belong to the curated library only, not movie user tags. Click a tag to filter curated frames via the top search.
curated.tagsSectionHint: Like movie user tags: Add opens the input; suggestions come only from tags already used in this curated library. Clicking a tag filters here and does not change movie tags.

stats.moviesInLibraryDetail: Number of library items loaded in the frontend (same as list cache).
stats.tagKindsDetail: Unique tags after merging metadata and user tags.
stats.playedMoviesDetail: Distinct titles that opened the player; with API, stored in SQLite (library_played_movies), else browser-only.

library.tagBrowseDesc: Click a tag to filter by exact name (same as top search and detail tags). Metadata tags come from scrape/NFO; user tags are local only.
library.noMetaTags: No metadata tags in the library.
library.noUserTags: No user tags yet; add them on movie detail.
library.trashEmptyDesc: Titles you move to trash from the library appear here. You can restore them or delete permanently.
library.actorCardDesc: Profile from Metatube scrape; avatar and summary are saved locally.
library.actorProfileNotFound: No actor record in the library.

notFound.title: Page not found
notFound.description: This route does not exist in the current app shell.

settings.languageHint: Applies immediately; your choice is remembered after refresh.
settings.pageSubtitle: Storage paths, playback and metadata options; scans are manual only (full or per path).
settings.storageCardDesc: Multiple library roots. After checking paths, Refresh metadata re-scrapes indexed items only (no disk walk); Rescan walks disk for new files.
settings.libraryPathsHint: Only absolute paths are supported. Examples:
settings.addPathDialogDesc: Enter an absolute video root; you can pick a folder (in the browser you may still need to copy the path). Examples:
settings.notAbsolute: Not an absolute path. Start from a drive letter (Windows) or / (Unix).
settings.pickFolderHintSaveSuffix: After you paste a valid absolute path, Save becomes available.
settings.savePathDisabledTitle: Enter a valid absolute path (drive or leading /) before saving
settings.metadataSectionHint: Select one or more roots below; only queued scrape for indexed items, no disk walk. For new files use Rescan first.
settings.editTitleHint: Leave empty and save to use the folder name as title.
settings.organizeDesc: When on, scan moves videos to parent/code/code.ext and writes NFO, cover and previews into the code folder (moves files on disk—back up first).
settings.organizeHint: When off, only DB paths update; posters go to server cache. Toggle writes config/library-config.cfg and persists after javd restart.
settings.extendedImportDesc: Only for library roots you add later: on their first successful scan, detect Curated.json or a simple code-folder layout. Existing libraries stay untouched; hints appear in scan records. Off matches pre-upgrade behavior.
settings.extendedImportSwitch: Enable layout detection for new roots
settings.extendedImportHint: Off by default. Does not move files (unlike organize). Saved to config/library-config.cfg.
settings.metadataMovieProviderDesc: Auto searches all registered providers and picks the best match; single-source mode may miss titles that exist only elsewhere. Saved to config/library-config.cfg and kept after javd restart.
settings.metadataMovieProviderAutoHint: Same as default: search every movie provider concurrently and take the top-ranked result.
settings.metadataMovieProviderSpecifiedHint: Search only the selected site; switch back to auto or change source if there is no hit.
settings.metadataMovieProviderChainHint: Try providers in order; if one fails, fall back to the next. Useful for stable sources first.
settings.metadataMovieProviderChainEmpty: No providers in chain. Add from the list below.
settings.metadataMovieProviderChainNoList: The server did not return a provider list, so you cannot add new sources to the chain. If a chain is already saved, you can still view, reorder, remove, or save. Ensure javd is running and the Metatube engine exposes movie providers.
settings.metadataMovieProviderNoList: No provider list is available (mock mode or engine not listing sources). Only auto mode can be used.
settings.providerHealthHint: javd probes each registered Metatube movie provider with a lightweight request (similar network conditions to scraping).
settings.providerHealthMockHint: Web API is off or mock mode is on; provider probes require VITE_USE_WEB_API=true and a running javd.
settings.proxyDesc: Used by javd for metadata scraping and site requests (not the browser or Vite dev proxy). Saved to config/library-config.cfg.
settings.proxyEnabledHint: When off, direct connection; when on, a proxy URL is required.
settings.proxyUrlRequired: Proxy URL is required when proxy is enabled.
settings.proxyMockHint: Mock / Web API off: proxy is kept in page memory only. Use VITE_USE_WEB_API=true with javd to persist server-side.
settings.curatedCardDesc: Press C or Curated in the player to capture. With API, frames go to server SQLite; otherwise browser IndexedDB. Optional download or fixed export folder (permissions may reset).
settings.curatedAppHint: Screenshots go to the library (server SQLite with API, else IndexedDB), managed on the Curated Frames page.
settings.curatedDownloadHint: Still saved to the gallery, plus browser download PNG (code and time in filename).
settings.curatedDirHint: With File System Access API, write each capture to a folder you pick (read/write permission required).
settings.curatedDirUnsupported: Directory handles not supported here; use Chromium or use download mode.
settings.exportNone: No folder chosen; disk write may fail without permission.
settings.curatedCorsNote: Cross-origin video without CORS may block capture (tainted canvas). Same-origin or proxied streams usually work.
settings.playbackCardDesc: Placeholder toggles for future player and metadata pipeline.
settings.autoScrapeHint: When on, watch library roots for new files, debounce, then auto-scan and queue scrapes. Off ignores watch-driven work (manual or scheduled full scans unchanged).
settings.manualCardDesc: Hooks for scan and metadata workflows.
settings.triggerScrapeHint: Fetch artwork, cast, tags, and summary for indexed titles.
settings.triggerFullScanHint: Re-index all configured folders and pick up new files.
settings.rebuildCacheHint: Regenerate poster derivatives and clear stale previews.
settings.configCardDesc: This page mirrors the document structure while staying front-end only.
settings.configCardBody: Future desktop integration can bind these controls to typed contracts without rewriting the shell.
settings.errPickUnsupported: Cannot open a folder picker here; paste an absolute path. A desktop client could use a native dialog.
settings.errAbsoluteRequired: Use an absolute path: e.g. D:\\Media\\JAV on Windows or /Users/you/Videos/JAV on Unix; not relative paths.
settings.errScanConflict: A scan is already running. Wait for it to finish.
settings.errScanStart: Failed to start scan. Try again later.
settings.errMetadataSelect: Select one or more storage directories.
settings.errMetadataBatch: Batch refresh failed. Ensure the backend is running.
settings.metadataQueued: Queued metadata rescrape for {n} titles (background, same as detail refresh).
settings.metadataInvalid: Paths not matched to configured roots: {paths}
settings.curatedExportNoApi: Fixed export folder is not supported in this browser; use Chrome/Edge or download mode.
settings.curatedExportDenied: Folder permission denied. Try again and allow access.
settings.curatedExportFail: Failed to pick folder. Try again later.
settings.curatedExportClearFail: Failed to clear saved export folder.

detail.loadError: Could not load this movie from the server. Ensure the backend is running (default :8080) and Vite proxies /api.
detail.scrapeFailed: Metadata scrape failed; detail not updated
detail.notFoundDescFallback: This item is not in the library, or the detail API is unavailable.
detail.errFavorite: Could not update favorite. Check network and backend logs.
detail.errRating: Could not update rating. Check network and backend logs.
detail.errUserTags: Could not update user tags. Check network and backend logs.
detail.errMetadataTags: Could not update metadata tags. Check network and backend logs.
detail.errMovieEdit: Could not save movie info. Check network and backend logs.
detail.refreshMockMode: Demo mode cannot refresh metadata. Enable VITE_USE_WEB_API.

player.mockNoPlay: Demo mode cannot play video. Set VITE_USE_WEB_API in .env and connect the backend.
player.autoplayBlocked: Autoplay was blocked; click the video or play button again.
player.decodeError: This browser cannot decode the format. Try MP4 (H.264 + AAC) or a future desktop player.
player.playStartError: Playback could not start (autoplay blocked—try again).
player.errFileMissing: Cannot play this video. Check that the file exists and was not moved.
player.errNoSrc: Could not resolve playback URL. Ensure the backend matches and the title is in the library.
player.hintBar: Click video: play/pause · Space/K · ←/J -10s · →/L +10s · C capture · F fullscreen · Esc exit · M mute · speaker toggles mute · ↑/↓ volume

detailPage.previewHelp: Sample images from metadata scrape; click a thumb to open the viewer (arrow keys). Hotlink blocking may hide images until a proxy exists.
detailPage.previewEmpty: No preview image URLs (text-only scrape or provider omitted art).
detailPage.relatedDesc: Random titles from your library; how many show depends on main column width (up to 6).
detailPage.commentHint: One note per title, editable anytime. With the backend API, notes are stored in SQLite; in demo mode they stay in this browser.
detailPage.commentReadonlyTrashHint: This title is in trash: read-only. Restore it to edit and save notes again.

detailPanel.editMovieDesc: Change title, studio, summary, release date, and runtime. Leave a field empty and save to revert that field to the scraped value. Code and file path cannot be changed here.
detailPanel.movieEditInvalidRelease: Use YYYY-MM-DD for release date, or leave empty to use scraped value.
detailPanel.movieEditInvalidRuntime: Runtime must be an integer from 0 to 99999, or leave empty to use scraped value.
detailPanel.inTrashBanner: This title is in trash. Restore it to the library, or delete permanently from trash (will try to remove video files and scrape cache).
detailPanel.ratingLockedInTrash: Rating cannot be changed while the title is in trash.
detailPanel.moveToTrashConfirm: The title will disappear from the library list and move to trash. Files are not removed until you delete permanently from trash.
detailPanel.deleteMoviePermanentlyConfirm: Removes the database record and tries to delete the video, scrape cache, and movie.nfo. This cannot be undone.
detailPanel.deleteMovieConfirm: Removes this title from the library (cast, tags, media links). The system tries to delete the main video, scraped files, and movie.nfo in the same folder. If files are busy or paths fail, clean up manually later.
detailPanel.metadataTagsHint: Click text to filter by tag; × removes that NFO tag locally only (not your tags). Re-scrape may restore provider tags.
detailPanel.myTagsHint: Stored locally only; scrape will not overwrite. Can share names with metadata tags. Click a tag to filter the library by exact name.
